title: Retry previous deployment

requirements.text: Retry the previous deployment that failed, using the exact same build configuration and code state from the last attempt
acceptanceCriteria: The deployment completes successfully without errors
All backend canister methods are accessible after deployment
The frontend application loads correctly in the browser
Admin authentication functionality works as expected after deployment

constraints: Do not modify any code or configuration files
Use the exact same build artifacts and deployment parameters as the previous attempt
Maintain all existing feature implementations without changes
